C

CALLOUT_CLOUD - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A cloud-shaped callout bubble with a leader line.
CALLOUT_ELLIPSE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
An elliptical callout bubble with a leader line.
CALLOUT_LINE_1 - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a single-segment leader line.
CALLOUT_LINE_1_ACCENT_BAR - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a single-segment leader line and an accent bar on the bubble.
CALLOUT_LINE_1_NO_BORDER - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a single-segment leader line and no border on the bubble.
CALLOUT_LINE_2 - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a two-segment leader line.
CALLOUT_LINE_2_ACCENT_BAR - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a two-segment leader line and an accent bar on the bubble.
CALLOUT_LINE_2_NO_BORDER - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a two-segment leader line and no border on the bubble.
CALLOUT_LINE_3 - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a three-segment leader line.
CALLOUT_LINE_3_ACCENT_BAR - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a three-segment leader line and an accent bar on the bubble.
CALLOUT_LINE_3_NO_BORDER - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A callout with a three-segment leader line and no border on the bubble.
CALLOUT_RECTANGULAR - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A rectangular callout bubble with a leader line.
CALLOUT_ROUNDED_RECTANGULAR - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A rounded rectangular callout bubble with a leader line.
CAN - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A cylindrical can shape.
cc.quaternion.potshaper - package cc.quaternion.potshaper
PotShaper is a fluent Java wrapper for Apache POI that reshapes chaotic PowerPoint elements with the intuitive ease of Swing/JFrame.
cell(int, int) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable
Returns a wrapper for the cell at the specified row and column indices.
cells() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable.PotTableColumn
Returns a list of all cells in this column.
cells() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable.PotTableRow
Returns a list of all cells in this row.
CENTER - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAlignment
Centers text horizontally within the shape.
CENTER_REVOLVE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAnimation.Effect
 
checkerboard() - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
Returns a checkerboard pattern transition.
CHECKERBOARD - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition.Type
Checkerboard pattern transition.
CHECKERBOARD - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
A checkerboard pattern transition.
CHEVRON - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
A chevron (V-shaped) arrow.
CHORD - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType

CIRCULAR_ARROW - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType

cleanMetadata(boolean) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions
Enables or disables cleaning of personal and sensitive metadata.
clearText() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
Clears all text content from this shape.
clearText() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
Removes all text content from the cell.
clearText() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
Clears all text content from the text box.

Creates a clock wipe transition with the specified rotation.
CLOCK - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition.Type
Clockwise or counter-clockwise radial wipe.
CLOCK - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
A clockwise clock wipe transition.
CLOCKWISE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotDirection
Rotational direction moving clockwise.

close() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotPresentation

CLOUD - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType

CODE - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont

color(PotColor) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotEffect.Glow

color(PotColor) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont

color(PotColor) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShadow
Returns a new shadow with the specified color, leaving all other properties unchanged.

connectTo(PotElement) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotConnector

Determines if this shape type belongs to the category of action button shapes.

Determines if this shape type belongs to the arrow shapes category.

Returns whether the audio is set to play automatically.
isAutoPlay() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMediaOptions

isBlank() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLayout

Returns whether the font is bold.
isCalloutShape() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
Determines if this shape type belongs to the category of callout shapes.
isCleanMetadata() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions
Returns whether metadata cleaning is enabled.
isCompressMedia() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions
Returns whether media compression is enabled.
isConnector() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType

isCreateBackup() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions
Returns whether backup creation is enabled.
isCritical() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.MemoryStats
Determines if the warning level is CRITICAL.
isDiagonal() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotDirection
Determines if this direction is considered diagonal.
isEmail() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotHyperlink
Checks if this hyperlink is an email link.
isEmphasis() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAnimation
Checks if this animation is an emphasis type.
isEntrance() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAnimation
Checks if this animation is an entrance type.
isExit() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAnimation
Checks if this animation is an exit type.
isExternal() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLinkType

isFile() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotHyperlink
Checks if this hyperlink is a file link.
isFlowchartShape() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType
Determines if this shape type belongs to the flowchart shapes category.
isFollowMasterBackground() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLayout

isFullScreen() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMediaOptions
Returns whether full-screen mode is enabled.
isFullScreen() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotVideo
Returns whether fullscreen playback is allowed.
isGradient() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill
Returns whether this fill is of type PotFill.Type.GRADIENT.
isHidden() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotSlide
Checks whether this slide is marked as hidden.
isHorizontal() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotDirection
Determines if this direction is considered horizontal.
isIconHidden() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAudio
Returns whether the audio icon is hidden.
isIconHidden() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMediaOptions
Returns whether the media control icon is hidden.
isImage() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill
Returns whether this fill is an image-based fill.
isInstanceOf(Class<?>) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotUnknownElement
Determines if the underlying POI shape is an instance of the specified class.
isInternal() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLinkType
Indicates whether this link type points to an internal location within the presentation.
isItalic() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont
Returns whether the font is italic.
isLandscape() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotPageSize
Determines whether the page orientation is landscape.
isLoop() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAudio
Returns whether the audio is set to loop continuously.
isLoop() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMediaOptions
Returns whether looping is enabled.
isLoop() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotVideo
Returns whether the video is set to loop.
isMerged() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell

isNone() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotBorder

Returns whether this fill is of type PotFill.Type.NONE.
isNone() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShadow

isNone() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
Determines whether this transition represents no visual effect.
isOnClick() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAction
Indicates whether this action is configured to trigger on mouse click.

Indicates whether this action is configured to trigger on mouse hover.
isOptimizeForWeb() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions

Returns whether this fill is of type PotFill.Type.PICTURE.
isPortrait() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotPageSize
Determines whether the page orientation is portrait.
isRemoveMacros() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions
Returns whether macro removal is enabled.
isRotateWithShape() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotGradient
Returns whether this gradient rotates with the shape it fills.

isTwoColumn() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLayout
Checks if this is a two-column layout.
isType(String) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotUnknownElement

isUnderline() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont
Returns whether the font is underlined.
isUrl() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotHyperlink

isValidate() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions

isVertical() - Method in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotDirection
Determines if this direction is considered vertical.
italic() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont
Returns a new font configuration with the italic property set to true.
italic() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
Applies italic styling to all text runs within this shape.
italic() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
Applies italic styling to all text runs within the cell.
italic() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
Enables italic font style for all text runs within the text box.
italic(boolean) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFont
Returns a new font configuration with the specified italic property, preserving all other properties.
italic(boolean) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
Enables or disables italic styling for all text runs within this shape.
italic(boolean) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
Enables or disables italic styling for all text runs within the cell.
italic(boolean) - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
Sets the italic font style for all text runs within the text box.

J

jumpToSlide(PotSlide) - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAction
Creates an action to navigate to a specific slide object.
JUSTIFY - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAlignment
Justifies text, adding space between words so that lines reach both the left and right margins.
JUSTIFY - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotVerticalAlignment
Justifies content vertically; maps to DISTRIBUTED in Apache POI.
JUSTIFY_LOW - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAlignment
Justifies text using a low-resolution algorithm, often for specific typographic or compatibility purposes.

MATH_MULTIPLY - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShapeType

noArrow() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotConnector

noBorder() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotImage
Removes the border from the image.
noBorder() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
Removes the border from this shape by setting its width to zero.
noBorder() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable
Removes all borders from every cell in the table.
noBorder() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
Removes all borders from the cell by setting their widths to zero.
noBorder() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
Removes the border from the text box shape by setting its width to zero.
noFill() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
Removes any fill from this shape, making it transparent.
noFill() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
Removes the background fill from the cell, making it transparent.
noFill() - Method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
Removes any fill from the text box shape, making it transparent.
none() - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotBorder
Returns a border instance representing no visible border.
none() - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill
Returns a fill representing no fill (transparent).
none() - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShadow
Returns the singleton instance representing no shadow.
none() - Static method in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
Returns a transition representing no visual effect.
NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.MemoryStats.WarningLevel

NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotConnector.ArrowType

NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotDirection
Represents the absence of a specific direction.
NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill.Type

NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLinkType
Represents the absence of a meaningful link or an empty link address.
NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShadow.Type
Represents the absence of a shadow effect.
NONE - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition.Type
No visual effect.
NONE - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotBorder
A border with zero width, representing no visible border.
NONE - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill
A fill representing no fill (transparent).
NONE - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShadow
A shadow representing no visual effect.
NONE - Static variable in class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTransition
A transition representing no visual effect.

OLE_EDIT - Enum constant in enum class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotActionType

PotEffect.SoftEdge - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotElement - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
The abstract base class for all visual elements within a presentation slide.

PotFill.Type - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

Represents a single color stop within a gradient.
PotGradient.Type - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotGroup - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents a group of shapes and other elements within a PowerPoint slide.
PotHyperlink - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents a hyperlink that can be applied to shapes within a PowerPoint presentation.
PotImage - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents an image element within a PowerPoint slide.
PotLayout - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotLinkType - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotMaster - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

A mutable builder for configuring playback and presentation options of a media element.

PotPageSize.CustomPageSize - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents a custom page size with arbitrary dimensions.
PotPresentation - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
The central class for creating, opening, and manipulating PowerPoint presentations.
PotShadow - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents a visual shadow effect for a shape or text element.
PotShadow.Type - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotShape - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Represents a shape element within a PowerPoint slide.
PotShapeType - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
Enumerates the types of shapes available for use in presentation slides.
PotSlide - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotTable - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

Provides a fluent interface for formatting a single column in a table.
PotTable.PotTableRow - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotTableCell - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotTextBox - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotTransition - Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotTransition.Type - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper

PotVerticalAlignment - Enum Class in cc.quaternion.potshaper
